# Terra Nova Equity LLC

> Terra Nova Equity LLC is a nationwide real estate investment company headquartered in Louisville, Kentucky. We buy houses and vacant land for cash in any condition across the United States. We specialize in rehabbing distressed properties to revitalize neighborhoods and purchasing vacant lots to support new home construction in growing communities.

## What We Do

- Buy houses for cash in as-is condition with no repairs needed
- Purchase vacant land and lots to support new home construction and community growth
- Close transactions in as little as 7 days
- Pay zero agent commissions, zero closing costs, and zero hidden fees
- Rehab distressed and neglected properties to bring new life to neighborhoods
- Buy vacant lots so new homes can be built on unused land, turning empty lots into thriving parts of neighborhoods

## How It Works

1. Submit your property details through our website form
2. Receive a no-obligation cash offer within 24 hours
3. If you accept, we close on your timeline (as fast as 7 days)
4. No showings, no inspections, no financing contingencies

## Properties We Buy

- Ugly or outdated houses
- Pre-foreclosure properties
- Inherited properties
- Divorce situations
- Fire-damaged homes
- Properties with tenant problems
- Vacant properties
- Properties with code violations
- Vacant land and lots

## Service Area

We operate across the entire United States. We have purchased properties in 48 states.

## Contact

- Website: https://www.terranovaequityllc.com
- Email: jimmy@terranovaequityllc.com
- Headquarters: Louisville, KY

## Key Facts

- 500+ properties purchased
- 48 states served
- 7-day closings available
- Zero fees and zero commissions
- Cash offers within 24 hours
- Buy properties in any condition, as-is
